name: mirelia-structured-data-marketplace
description: Autonomous A2A marketplace providing AI-optimized USPTO patent JSON datasets for R&D agents. Specializes in IPC/CPC Sections G (Physics/Computing) & H (Electricity). Features discovery and instant M2M delivery via MPP v1.0 (402 Payment) workflow. Supports single patents ($0.50) and bulk. Implements EOA/AA dual-wallet routing on Base, Polygon (USDC), and Oasis (ROSE).
